instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Do not begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop."
response: Stepping into this coffee shop reveals a warm, inviting space designed for relaxation. The atmosphere is incredibly cozy, with soft lighting and comfortable seating that encourages lingering conversations. The menu offers a surprising variety of options, ranging from classic brews to creative lattes made with locally sourced ingredients. Staff members greet every visitor with a genuine smile and provide attentive service throughout the visit. They know their drinks well and can offer helpful suggestions based on your preferences without being pushy. The baristas take pride in their craft, ensuring each cup is prepared with care and precision. Fresh pastries sit on display, adding to the sensory experience of the morning routine. Prices are reasonable for the quality provided, making it accessible for everyone in the community. This establishment truly stands out among local competitors with its unique charm and consistent excellence. I highly recommend visiting The Daily Grind for your next caffeine fix. It is a delightful addition to the neighborhood.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.new_constraint: Do not begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.org_constraint: Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop."
